expectations.text: Identifies func.lower(User.email) as a function on the column that prevents using the existing email index (forces a sequential scan)
expectations.evidence: 'non-sargable predicate'; wrapped column -> sequential scan evaluating lower() on 12M rows

expectations.text: Explains the existing B-tree index is on the raw email value, so it cannot serve lower(email)
expectations.evidence: 'expression in the index (email) and in WHERE (lower(email)) do not match'

expectations.text: Recommends a concrete fix: a functional/expression index on lower(email), normalizing email on write, or citext
expectations.evidence: Option A functional index / citext; Option B normalize on write and drop lower()

expectations.text: States the tradeoff of the recommended fix (e.g. functional index taxes writes, or normalization needs a migration)
expectations.evidence: CONCURRENTLY to avoid lock; confirm no case-collisions; Option B requires normalize-on-write
